metadata.description: Vehicle systems + parts from DGT ITI syllabi — LLM-extracted (v2) + hand-curated (v1) merged with per-part provenance. See ADR 008.
metadata.note: Each part's provenance[] array lists every source that attests to it. Hand-curated v1 and LLM v2 co-exist; queries can filter by method if needed.

systems.description: Vehicle air conditioning and heating. Covers refrigeration cycle components and cabin air management.

parts.name: AC pressure switch
parts.role: Cuts compressor on high/low pressure fault

parts.name: Compressor
parts.role: Compresses refrigerant gas to high pressure

parts.name: Pressure switch
parts.role: protects AC system from over/under pressure

systems.description: Vehicle lighting, signaling, comfort, and safety electronics. Covers lamps, wipers, power windows, instruments, and safety systems.

parts.name: Accelerator Pedal
parts.role: Driver torque demand input to VCU/motor controller

parts.name: Charging Gauge
parts.role: Instrument cluster indicator for battery level

parts.name: Injector Testing Set
parts.role: Tests diesel injector spray and opening pressure

parts.name: Multi Scan Tool
parts.role: Reads ECU data / DTCs on CRDI engines

parts.name: Telematics Unit
parts.role: Cellular connectivity for remote diagnostics and fleet management

systems.description: Decelerates and stops the vehicle. Covers disc brakes, drum brakes, hydraulic actuation, and ABS.

parts.name: ABS Sensor
parts.role: Monitors wheel rotation speed for ABS

parts.name: Air tank
parts.role: Stores compressed air for air brakes (HMV)

parts.name: Brake Booster
parts.role: Assists brake pedal effort via engine vacuum

parts.name: Brake chamber
parts.role: Converts air pressure to mechanical force in air brakes

parts.name: Brake warning light
parts.role: indicates low fluid or parking brake

parts.name: Master cylinder
parts.role: Converts pedal force to hydraulic pressure

parts.name: Slack adjuster
parts.role: Adjusts brake clearance in air brakes

parts.name: Vacuum booster
parts.role: Amplifies pedal force using engine vacuum

parts.name: hydraulic brake cylinder
parts.role: actuates brake shoes via hydraulic pressure

parts.name: Engine mounting
parts.role: Mounts engine to chassis; isolates vibration

parts.name: Gear Box
parts.role: Single-speed reduction for most EVs; multi-speed in some 4W EVs

systems.description: Maintains engine operating temperature by transferring excess heat. Covers liquid cooling and air cooling components.

parts.name: Battery Cooling Fan
parts.role: Active air cooling for battery pack

parts.name: Battery Cooling System
parts.role: Active/passive cooling to maintain cell temperature

parts.name: Condenser
parts.role: Heat exchanger rejecting heat from refrigerant

parts.name: Coolant Hose
parts.role: Routes coolant between radiator and engine

parts.name: Coolant recovery tank
parts.role: Holds overflow coolant; re-supplies radiator on cooling

parts.name: Electric Compressor
parts.role: HV-driven AC compressor for cabin cooling and battery cooling

parts.name: Inverter Cooling
parts.role: Cooling circuit for motor controller/inverter assembly

parts.name: Magnetic Clutch
parts.role: Engages/disengages compressor in some HVAC systems

parts.name: Radiator Hose
parts.role: Routes coolant between engine and radiator

parts.name: Radiator Pressure Cap
parts.role: Maintains cooling system pressure, allows recovery overflow

parts.name: Thermo-Switch
parts.role: Turns on electric cooling fan at threshold temp

parts.name: Thermostat
parts.role: Regulates coolant flow based on temperature

systems.description: Generates, stores, and distributes electrical power. Covers battery, charging, starting, ignition, and electronic control systems.

parts.name: Alternator
parts.role: converts mechanical to electrical energy, charges battery

parts.name: Alternator brush
parts.role: Contacts slip ring to carry field current

parts.name: Battery
parts.role: Stores electrical energy for starting and electronics

parts.name: Flywheel ring gear
parts.role: Ring gear on flywheel engaged by starter pinion

parts.name: Glow Plug
parts.role: Pre-heats combustion chamber for diesel cold start

parts.name: Rectifier assembly
parts.role: converts AC to DC in alternator

parts.name: Relay
parts.role: switches high current via low current coil

parts.name: Solenoid
parts.role: engages starter pinion and switches heavy current

parts.name: Solenoid switch
parts.role: Engages pinion and switches high current to starter

parts.name: Starter Solenoid
parts.role: Electromagnetically engages starter drive and switches heavy current

parts.name: Starter pinion
parts.role: Engages flywheel ring gear to crank engine

parts.name: capacitor
parts.role: suppresses arcing at points / stores CDI charge

parts.name: high-tension lead
parts.role: carries HV from coil to plug

parts.name: regulator rectifier
parts.role: rectifies AC to DC and regulates voltage

systems.description: Internal combustion engine — converts fuel energy to mechanical motion. Covers cylinder block, valve train, and rotating assembly.

parts.name: Big End Bearing
parts.role: Bearing at crankshaft end of conrod

parts.name: Camshaft
parts.role: Rotating shaft with lobes that actuate valves

parts.name: Crank case
parts.role: Lower engine housing; contains crank & oil

parts.name: Cylinder Block
parts.role: Main engine casting housing cylinders and crankshaft

parts.name: Cylinder Head
parts.role: Seals top of cylinder, houses valves and combustion chamber

parts.name: Cylinder Head Gasket
parts.role: Seals joint between block and head

parts.name: Engine Valve
parts.role: Controls gas flow in/out of cylinder

parts.name: Flywheel
parts.role: Stores rotational energy, smooths power pulses

parts.name: Head Gasket
parts.role: Seals joint between head and block

parts.name: Piston
parts.role: Reciprocates in cylinder, transfers combustion pressure to conrod

parts.name: Push Rod
parts.role: Transfers motion from tappet to rocker arm

parts.name: Pushrod
parts.role: Transfers lifter motion to rocker arm (OHV engines)

parts.name: Small end bearing
parts.role: Bearing between conrod and piston pin

parts.name: Tappet
parts.role: Transfers cam lobe motion to pushrod/valve

parts.name: Timing Chain
parts.role: Chain drive syncing crank and cam

parts.name: Valve Seat
parts.role: Sealing surface for valve in head

parts.name: Valve Stem Oil Seal
parts.role: Prevents oil leaking past valve stem

parts.name: engine valves
parts.role: control gas flow in/out of cylinder

parts.name: oil seal
parts.role: prevents oil leakage at rotating shafts

parts.name: valve
parts.role: controls gas flow in/out of cylinder

systems.description: EV-specific powertrain and energy systems. Covers traction motor, battery pack, power electronics, and charging.

parts.name: 12V Auxiliary Battery
parts.role: Powers low-voltage accessories when vehicle is off

parts.name: BLDC Motor
parts.role: Common traction motor type, especially for 2W EVs (Ola, Ather, TVS iQube)

parts.name: BMS
parts.role: Monitors and controls battery pack: SoC, SoH, cell balancing, thermal protection, charging/discharging

parts.name: BMS Sensors
parts.role: Inputs to BMS for pack monitoring

parts.name: Battery Module
parts.role: Sub-assembly of cells within battery pack; often swapped as service unit

parts.name: Battery Temperature Sensor
parts.role: Monitors cell/pack temperature for thermal protection

parts.name: Bharat DC-001
parts.role: Indian DC charging standard for low-voltage EVs

parts.name: Brake Pedal Sensor
parts.role: Signals driver braking demand; blended with regen

parts.name: DC-DC Converter
parts.role: Steps HV battery voltage down to 12V for auxiliaries and accessories

parts.name: Friction Brake
parts.role: Conventional brake blended with regenerative braking

parts.name: GB/T Connector
parts.role: Chinese DC charging standard, used in some Indian EVs

parts.name: HV Battery Pack
parts.role: Primary energy storage for EV propulsion

parts.name: HV Cabling
parts.role: Carries high voltage between battery, inverter, OBC, DC-DC

parts.name: HV Contactor
parts.role: Connects/disconnects battery pack from HV bus

parts.name: HVIL Loop
parts.role: Safety interlock that opens contactors if HV connectors are disturbed

parts.name: IGBT Module
parts.role: Power switching device inside motor controller/inverter

parts.name: Induction Motor
parts.role: Traction motor type used in some 4W EVs

parts.name: Lead Acid Battery
parts.role: Legacy/low-cost EV energy storage and 12V auxiliary

parts.name: MOSFET
parts.role: Power semiconductor switch used in 2W EV motor controllers

parts.name: Motor Controller
parts.role: Controls speed and torque of traction motor; converts DC from battery to AC for motor

parts.name: Motor Rotor Position Sensor
parts.role: Feedback sensor for motor controller commutation

parts.name: Onboard Charger
parts.role: Converts AC from charging station to DC for battery pack

parts.name: PMSM
parts.role: High-efficiency traction motor used in 4W EVs

parts.name: Pack Sealing / Enclosure
parts.role: Structural and ingress protection for battery pack

parts.name: Regenerative Braking Controller
parts.role: Captures kinetic energy via motor and returns it to battery

parts.name: Scan Tool
parts.role: Reads DTCs from EV ECUs, inverter, BMS

parts.name: Solar Charger
parts.role: Solar-sourced EV charging, mentioned in Indian context

parts.name: Traction Inverter
parts.role: DC to AC inverter feeding traction motor

parts.name: Traction Motor
parts.role: Converts electrical energy to mechanical torque to drive the wheels

parts.name: inverter assembly
parts.role: DC to AC conversion for motor

systems.description: Routes exhaust gases out and reduces harmful emissions. Covers exhaust manifold, catalytic converter, EGR, and sensors.

parts.name: Catalytic converter
parts.role: Reduces harmful emissions via catalytic reaction

parts.name: DPF
parts.role: Traps soot particles from diesel exhaust

parts.name: Exhaust pipe
parts.role: Carries exhaust gases to rear of vehicle

parts.name: Flexible connection
parts.role: Allows exhaust movement between engine and body

parts.name: Oxygen Sensor
parts.role: Monitors exhaust oxygen content for ECU fuel control

parts.name: PCV Valve
parts.role: Vents crankcase blow-by gases back to intake

parts.name: SCR (Selective Catalytic Reduction)
parts.role: Injects urea to reduce NOx in diesel exhaust

parts.name: Turbocharger
parts.role: Uses exhaust energy to compress intake air

systems.description: Stores, delivers, and meters fuel to the engine. Covers carburetion, fuel injection (MPFI/CRDI), and fuel supply.

parts.name: Carburettor
parts.role: Mixes air and fuel for petrol engine

parts.name: Common Rail (CRDI)
parts.role: High-pressure rail feeds electronically-controlled injectors in modern diesels

parts.name: Diesel Injector
parts.role: Atomizes and sprays fuel into combustion chamber

parts.name: Distributor-Type Injection Pump
parts.role: Single rotating plunger distributes fuel to all cylinders; common in smaller diesels

parts.name: ECU (Electronic Control Unit)
parts.role: Controls diesel injection timing, quantity based on sensor data

parts.name: Fuel Feed Pump
parts.role: Transfers fuel from tank to injection pump (mechanical or electrical)

parts.name: Fuel Injection Pump (FIP)
parts.role: Pressurizes and meters diesel fuel to injectors at precise timing

parts.name: Fuel Line
parts.role: Carries fuel from tank to pump/injectors

parts.name: Glow Plug
parts.role: Heats combustion chamber for cold-start of diesel engine

parts.name: HEUI injector
aliases: hydraulically actuated electronically controlled unit injector
parts.role: hydraulically actuated electronically controlled unit injector

parts.name: Injection Pump
parts.role: Pressurizes and times diesel fuel delivery

parts.name: Inline Injection Pump
parts.role: Plunger-per-cylinder pump for diesel fuel delivery; common in HMV/commercial diesels

parts.name: Lift pump
parts.role: Pumps fuel from tank to injection system

parts.name: Mechanical Governor
parts.role: Mechanically regulates engine speed by controlling fuel

parts.name: Plunger Pump
parts.role: High-pressure fuel pumping element inside FIP

parts.name: Pneumatic Governor
parts.role: Uses intake vacuum to regulate engine speed

parts.name: Priming Pump
parts.role: Manually bleeds air from diesel fuel lines

parts.name: Venturi Control Unit
parts.role: Part of pneumatic governor sensing intake airflow

parts.name: carburetor
parts.role: mixes air and fuel for SI engine

parts.name: carburetor float
parts.role: maintains fuel level in float bowl

parts.name: diesel fuel injection pump
parts.role: meters and pressurizes fuel for injectors

parts.name: float valve
parts.role: controls fuel inflow into float chamber

parts.name: metering jet
parts.role: meters fuel at different throttle openings

parts.name: oxygen sensor
parts.role: measures exhaust O2 for fuel trim

parts.name: Air Compressor
parts.role: Compresses air for air brake system (HMV)

parts.name: Air Exhauster
parts.role: Creates vacuum for vacuum-assisted brakes on diesel engines

parts.name: Catalytic Converter
parts.role: Converts exhaust pollutants via catalytic reaction

parts.name: Intercooler
parts.role: Cools compressed intake air from turbo

parts.name: Turbocharger
parts.role: Exhaust-driven compressor that increases intake air pressure

systems.description: Reduces friction and wear between moving parts by supplying pressurized oil. Covers oil pump, filtration, and galleries.

parts.name: Oil Pan
parts.role: Stores engine oil at bottom of engine

parts.name: Oil Pressure Sensor
parts.role: Monitors oil pressure for warning system

parts.name: Oil pickup tube
parts.role: Draws oil from sump to pump

parts.name: PCV Valve
parts.role: Vents crankcase gases back to intake

parts.name: Pickup Tube
parts.role: Draws oil from sump to pump

parts.name: steering brake
parts.role: paired with steering clutch for turns

parts.name: steering clutch
parts.role: steers power tiller by disengaging one side

parts.name: PTO unit
parts.role: drives PTO shaft at standard rpm

systems.description: Controls vehicle direction. Covers manual steering, power steering (hydraulic and electric), and wheel alignment.

parts.name: Drop arm
parts.role: Transfers motion from steering box to linkage

parts.name: King pin
parts.role: Steering pivot on solid front axle

parts.name: Power steering pump
parts.role: Supplies hydraulic pressure for power steering

parts.name: Steering Knuckle
parts.role: Carries wheel hub, pivots for steering

parts.name: Steering Rack
parts.role: Converts rotary steering input to linear wheel motion

parts.name: Steering column
parts.role: Connects steering wheel to steering gearbox

parts.name: Steering gearbox
parts.role: Reduces and transmits steering motion (worm & roller / recirculating ball / rack & pinion)

parts.name: Tie rod
parts.role: Connects steering linkage to steering knuckle

parts.name: distributor valve
parts.role: directs hydraulic fluid in power steering

parts.name: front axle
parts.role: supports front wheels, pivots for steering

parts.name: steering arm
parts.role: transfers motion from gearbox to linkage

parts.name: steering gear box
parts.role: converts steering rotation to linkage motion

systems.description: Absorbs road shocks and maintains tire contact with road surface. Covers springs, dampers, and linkages.

parts.name: Ball Joint
parts.role: Pivot point connecting control arm to knuckle

parts.name: Control Arm
parts.role: Links wheel assembly to vehicle frame

parts.name: Shackle
parts.role: Pivoting link for leaf spring ends

parts.name: Strut Mount
parts.role: Connects strut to body, allows rotation

systems.description: Transmits engine power to wheels with variable speed/torque ratios. Covers clutch, gearbox, propeller shaft, differential, and axles.

parts.name: Axle Shaft
parts.role: Transmits power from differential to wheel

parts.name: CV Joint
parts.role: Allows power transmission at variable angles (FWD)

parts.name: Clutch driven plate
parts.role: Friction plate splined to gearbox input shaft

parts.name: Clutch pressure plate
parts.role: Applies clamping force on clutch disc

parts.name: Constant velocity joint
parts.role: Transfers torque through variable angle at constant speed (FWD)

parts.name: Differential
parts.role: Permits different wheel speeds in turns

parts.name: Dual mass flywheel
parts.role: Damps torsional vibrations between engine and gearbox

parts.name: Gear shift mechanism
parts.role: Translates driver input into gear selection

parts.name: Limited slip differential
parts.role: Limits speed difference between driven wheels

parts.name: Pilot bearing
parts.role: Supports gearbox input shaft in crankshaft

parts.name: Propeller shaft
parts.role: Transfers torque from gearbox to rear axle

parts.name: Rear axle
parts.role: Drives rear wheels; houses final drive

parts.name: Release Bearing
parts.role: Disengages pressure plate when pedal pressed

parts.name: Transfer case
parts.role: Distributes torque between front/rear axles in 4WD

parts.name: Universal joint
parts.role: Allows angle change in prop shaft

parts.name: clutch shaft
parts.role: input shaft from clutch to gearbox

parts.name: differential lock
parts.role: locks both wheels to rotate together for traction (key tractor feature)

parts.name: driven sprocket
parts.role: on rear wheel, takes chain drive
